com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message
com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.PumpVersionBResponse
public class PumpVersionBResponse extends Message
Response message for PumpVersionBRequest, opCode -123, size 60

 size  60 
 type  MessageType.RESPONSE 
 characteristic  Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS
